title: astragalus purshii var. leucolobus
intro: Astragalus purshii var. leucolobus, also known as Leucolobus milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus purshii var. leucolobus include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule, tablet, or tea form, or used topically in salves and creams.
